_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis-1 heterozygosity increases microglia in a spatially and temporally restricted pattern relevant to mouse optic glioma formation and growth.

_contextSnippet: GCV-mediated microglia ablation reduced optic glioma proliferation (Ki67-positive staining), by 94%
details: Successfully detected proliferating cells in optic gliomas, showing 94% reduction after microglia ablation in established tumors
